title: Kabo Village Marker
description: A mod to visualize where villages are in Minecraft
body:
# Kabo Village Marker

Village Marker is a mod by KaboPC. Check out the [Minecraft forum post](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1288327-village-marker-mod) for more information about the original mod.

This project is an Ornithe port of the original, heavily utilizing its code. Changes were made to config management and client-server communication, for which this port depends on [OSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/osl/).

## Features

The mod does 3 things

- Draw a sphere around each village, centered at the village center, with a size of the village radius.
- Draw lines connecting each door of the village to the village center.
- Draw a box around the area of the village where iron golems can spawn. 

Each of these features can be toggled on and off in the config file (a GUI for it will come later), which can be found at `/.minecraft/config/kabo-village-marker.json`.
